overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white cape exploring a futuristic command center. The character walks through a high-tech control room filled with workstations and holographic displays, approaching a large data visualization wall while passing by NPC operators.

scene_state.functional_zone: control room floor with monitoring stations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the control room past rows of computer workstations and empty chairs

notable_agents.action: standing at a workstation monitoring screens on the right side of the room

entered.detail: rows of computer workstations with multiple monitors and control panels
ergonomic office chairs positioned at the workstations throughout the room
large array of screens and holographic displays covering the far wall
metal safety railing running along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic control room with industrial metal flooring and cool blue lighting. Rows of computer workstations with monitors line the space, while a large display wall is visible in the distance. An NPC stands at a workstation on the right side, monitoring the screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: data visualization wall with holographic displays

events.description: moving from the open workstation floor into the display wall area at the back of the control room
character stops walking and stands before the large holographic displays to examine the data

agents.ego_description: approaching the large data visualization wall and stopping to examine the holographic readouts and technical schematics

notable_agents.action: standing with arms crossed near the railing, observing the display wall

entered.detail: tall equipment racks with blinking lights and technical hardware
curved console desk with specialized monitoring equipment near the railing

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the back area of the control room, approaching a massive wall of holographic displays showing technical data and schematics. Server equipment lines the right side while another NPC stands near an analysis desk on the left. The character stops to examine the detailed readouts on the large screens.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a high-tech command center that transitions from a wide industrial corridor into an intimate data analysis hub. It begins with the character walking across metal flooring under cool blue lighting, passing rows of computer workstations and a monitoring NPC. As the character advances deeper into the room, the perspective shifts toward the back area where the environment becomes more densely packed with server equipment and analysis desks. The scene then opens up to reveal a massive wall of holographic displays filled with technical schematics and data. Finally, the camera comes to a halt as the character stops to examine the detailed readouts on the glowing screens.
